summary: Phase 4.5 Behavioral Tightening Testing Complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all Phase 4.5 features: (1) Forced decision modal appears 3 seconds after Dashboard load with 'Your story is waiting' headline, cliffhanger text, Continue Now button, Later button, and X close button. Modal uses sessionStorage to prevent re-showing in same session. (2) ReturnBanner shows 'Your story isn't over' with cliffhanger text and Continue button. (3) StreakDisplay shows emotional messaging based on streak count ('Create a story today to start your streak' for streak=0) and 'Continue today to keep your streak alive' in milestone progress text. (4) Auto-next trigger in PostGenPhase has 'That was just the beginning...' header with Continue Next Episode and Share buttons. (5) Email nudge system queues emails with character_name, cliffhanger, and deep link. (6) Content seeding themes are hook-based (emotional, mystery, kids, viral).
critical_code_review_comments: ReturnBanner.js correctly implements forced decision modal with 3-sec delay using setTimeout and sessionStorage check (lines 29-39)
Modal has correct data-testid attributes: return-modal, return-modal-headline, return-modal-continue-btn, return-modal-later-btn, return-modal-close
StreakDisplay.js has getEmotionalMessage() function with 5 emotional messages based on streak count (lines 45-51)
StreakDisplay shows 'Continue today to keep your streak alive' in milestone progress text (line 102)
StoryVideoPipeline.js has auto-next trigger at line 1272 with 'That was just the beginning...' header and Continue Next Episode + Share buttons
PostGenPhase checks streak API on READY state for reward celebration (lines 926-955)
retention_routes.py has run_email_nudges() function (lines 336-409) that queues emails with character_name, cliffhanger, and deep link
Content seeding themes are hook-based: emotional, mystery, kids, viral (lines 446-462)
seed_data_creation: Admin seed-content endpoint tested - creates QUEUED jobs with hook-based themes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4.5 Behavioral Tightening verified: (1) Forced decision modal appears 3 sec after Dashboard load with 'Your story is waiting' headline, cliffhanger, Continue Now/Later buttons. Uses sessionStorage key 'return_modal_seen' to prevent re-showing. (2) ReturnBanner shows above fold with 'Your story isn't over' headline and Continue button. (3) StreakDisplay has emotional messaging via getEmotionalMessage() - different messages for streak 0, 1, <3, <7, 7+. Shows 'Continue today to keep your streak alive' in milestone text. (4) Auto-next trigger in PostGenPhase shows 'That was just the beginning...' + Continue Next Episode + Share after 8 seconds. (5) PostGenPhase checks streak API on READY for celebration toast. (6) Email nudge system: run_email_nudges() queues emails with character_name, cliffhanger, deep link. GET /api/retention/admin/email-nudges returns pending/sent counts. (7) Content seeding themes are hook-based (emotional, mystery, kids, viral). (8) All Phase 4 features still working: streak API, return-banner API, rankings API.

Forced_Decision_Modal.details: Modal appears 3 sec after Dashboard load with 'Your story is waiting' headline, cliffhanger text, Continue Now button, Later button, X close button. Uses sessionStorage to prevent re-showing.

Modal_Dismissal.details: Modal can be dismissed with X button or Later button. Does not reappear in same session.

ReturnBanner.details: Shows above fold with 'Your story isn't over' headline, cliffhanger text, and Continue button

StreakDisplay_Emotional_Messaging.details: Shows emotional messages based on streak count: 'Create a story today to start your streak' (0), 'Great start!' (1), 'Don't break it' (<3), 'You're on fire' (<7), 'Legendary streak' (7+)

StreakDisplay_Milestone_Text.details: 'Continue today to keep your streak alive' text shown in milestone progress section

Auto_Next_Trigger.details: PostGenPhase shows 'That was just the beginning...' header + 'What happens next?' + Continue Next Episode button + Share button after 8 seconds

Reward_Celebration.details: PostGenPhase checks streak API on READY state for celebration toast (lines 926-955)

Email_Nudge_System.details: run_email_nudges() queues emails with character_name, cliffhanger, deep link. GET /api/retention/admin/email-nudges returns pending/sent counts.

Hook_Based_Content_Seeding.details: Themes include emotional, mystery, kids, viral categories

Streak_API.details: GET /api/retention/streak returns current_streak, longest_streak, next_milestone, next_reward, milestones_claimed

Return_Banner_API.details: GET /api/retention/return-banner returns has_story, story, cliffhanger, character_name, series_info

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is NOT mocked — emails are queued in DB (email_nudges collection) but not actually sent. The endpoint correctly reports this.
